# CatchFire Influencer Matching Engine — Source Directory

This directory contains the core application source code:
- `index.js` — Main Express server with all API endpoints
- `schemas.ts` — Zod schemas and TypeScript types
- `scoring.ts` — Scoring algorithm for brief-to-creator matching
- `llm.js` — Gemini AI integration (categorization, embeddings, style signatures)
- `feedback-sheet.js` — Google Sheets feedback integration

Use CommonJS (`require`/`module.exports`). See root CLAUDE.md for full coding standards.
